used.description: Nautical compass rose with cardinal points unfolding over latitude/longitude grid, gold and navy palette with twinkling stars
Wireframe globe with orbiting dots tracing flight paths between continents, teal/gold/coral palette
Hyperspace warp tunnel with star streaks radiating from a bright central core, deep-space blue palette with pulsing glow
Neon speedometer gauge with sweeping needle, RPM bars, and perspective road with speed lines — cyberpunk racing aesthetic
Deep-sea bioluminescent reef with pulsing coral glows, floating plankton particles in cyan/magenta/blue, swaying anemone tendrils
CRT-style retro arcade with falling Tetris blocks, Pac-Man ghost, space invader sprite, snake body, bouncing pong ball — pixel art cascade
